adds.rationale: Constellation Energy signed a 20-year PPA with Microsoft to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1, the first concrete hyperscaler-to-nuclear deal and a clear buildup-phase signal for the SMR/nuclear-revival wave named in the profile.

news_evidence.summary: Constellation to restart Three Mile Island reactor under 20-year Microsoft PPA to power AI data centers
Microsoft-Constellation deal marks first major hyperscaler nuclear PPA, lifts CEG shares ~22% on the day
Constellation Energy Q2 2024 results: nuclear fleet ran at 94.5% capacity factor; management flagged accelerating data-center power demand

removes.rationale: AAPL has lagged the 2024 AI mega-cap trade (MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, AMZN already cover that exposure) and the iPhone 16 / Apple Intelligence launch drew muted demand signals; consistent with the profile's 'trim before crest' discipline on AI, drop the weakest AI mega-cap to free a slot for the emerging nuclear leg.

news_evidence.summary: Analysts cut iPhone 16 demand estimates after preorder weekend, citing slower-than-expected Pro Max lead times
Apple Intelligence rollout delayed for EU and key features pushed to later iOS 18 point releases
Apple shares trail MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL YTD as AI monetization path remains indirect vs hyperscaler peers

rationale_overall: Swap AAPL for CEG. The Microsoft-Constellation Three Mile Island PPA is the cleanest buildup-phase signal yet for the nuclear-revival wave the profile names as a next-wave priority, and AAPL is the weakest leg of the AI mega-cap exposure (MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA/AMZN/TSM retain that beta). Post-swap watchlist holds at 16 with a slightly heavier non-tech / energy-transition tilt, consistent with 'ride AI but trim before crest.'
